arts.ttl: Chris Wilder Reflects on Big Three Points For the Blades Down at The Den
arts.sum: Sheffield United secured a hard-fought 1-0 victory over Millwall at The Den, with Rhian Brewster’s first goal of the season proving decisive. The Blades relied on solid defending and a touch of luck to claim all three points, as Millwall hit the woodwork twice in a tight game.
